Epic: E1 Classroom Session Architecture Stabilization

Epic: E1 Classroom Session Architecture Stabilization
Task: Normalize Agora callbacks into typed RtcEvent stream
Acceptance Criteria: User join/leave/video/audio/speaking callbacks are emitted as typed events and consumed by orchestrator tests

Epic: E1 Classroom Session Architecture Stabilization
Task: Implement ClassroomState and lifecycle state machine
Acceptance Criteria: Lifecycle transitions joining->connected->degraded->reconnecting->resumed->ended are deterministic and unit-tested

Epic: E1 Classroom Session Architecture Stabilization
Task: Route all RTC events through orchestrator reducer
Acceptance Criteria: UI no longer mutates session state directly from raw callbacks; reducer handles all event transitions

Epic: E1 Classroom Session Architecture Stabilization
Task: Replace single remote UID model with Map<int, ParticipantState>

Epic: E1 Classroom Session Architecture Stabilization
Task: Add participant-state unit tests

Task: Integrate metrics feed (loss/rtt/bitrate/freeze) into quality controller
Acceptance Criteria: Controller receives periodic network metrics and emits tier-change events consumed by orchestrator

Epic: E2 Network Resilience and Adaptive Media Quality

Acceptance Criteria: Dual stream mode active; high/low profile settings applied and verified in logs per tier

Epic: E2 Network Resilience and Adaptive Media Quality
Task: Implement spotlight stream switching policy
Acceptance Criteria: Tutor/spotlight participant gets high stream; non-spotlight participants use low stream with stable switching

Epic: E2 Network Resilience and Adaptive Media Quality
Task: Implement participant reconnect grace timer and tile retention

Task: Escalate reconnect messaging by elapsed duration

Acceptance Criteria: Users always see accurate session state; no conflicting status banners during transitions

Task: Apply minimum display durations to reduce flicker

Task: Build tutor-first spotlight + participant grid layout manager
